overall.description: Gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the protagonist Geralt walking at night through a snowy forest toward a lakeside dock. The character carries a torch illuminating the path as they approach a stone tower and eventually walk onto a wooden pier to gaze at the full moon.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy forest trail with wooden posts

events.description: companion character with torch visible briefly on right side of path
stone tower becomes visible through the trees ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along forest path carrying torch to light the way through the snow

notable_agents.action: standing with torch near path edge at start of clip

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through tall grass and snow
rough wooden posts marking the path edge
tall dark stone tower visible through the trees
tall thin trees with white bark lining the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense snowy forest, carrying a torch that casts warm light on the path. Wooden posts line the left side of the trail while a stone tower becomes visible in the distance ahead. A companion with a torch stands briefly visible on the right at the start.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside shore with beached boat and wooden dock

events.description: exits forest path onto sandy shore, beached boat comes into view on the right
steps onto wooden dock structure extending over the water

agents.ego_description: approaching the shoreline and stepping onto wooden dock structure

entered.detail: beach area at the water's edge with scattered snow
small wooden rowboat pulled up on the shore
pile of wooden crates on the beach
wooden pier extending into the dark water

segments.scene_description: The scene opens onto a sandy lakeshore where a wooden rowboat sits beached on the right. The character approaches a wooden dock extending into the water, passing wooden crates on the left. The stone tower now appears on the left side of the frame as the character steps onto the dock.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden pier over water with full moon view

events.description: character stops at end of dock and camera tilts upward to reveal full moon

agents.ego_description: walking to end of dock then stopping to gaze up at the full moon

entered.detail: large bright full moon in the night sky
dark calm water surrounding the dock

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wooden dock over dark water, moving away from the shore. Reaching the end of the pier, the camera tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon in the clear night sky, with the stone tower now prominent on the left side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a dense, snowy forest that gradually opens onto a moonlit lakeside pier. It begins on a narrow dirt trail where a torch casts a warm glow over the snow and wooden posts, passing a companion before a distant stone tower comes into view. As the forest thins, the scene opens onto a sandy lakeshore with a beached rowboat and wooden crates, leading the character toward the water. The camera then follows the character as they step onto a wooden dock and move away from the shore over dark water, with the stone tower now prominent to the left. Finally, upon reaching the end of the pier, the camera tilts upward to reveal a bright full moon hanging in the clear night sky.
